form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on March 7 over 520m at this track behind Fascinate Samuel beaten 13 lengths (30.71). Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by 2 lengths at this track over 520m (30.04) beating Fascinate Kath in Grade 5 on March 26. Has good early burn and will use the good box well.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 520m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (29.93) behind Texas Bandit in a NG on March 28. Missed the frame last time but prior to that had two placings in a row. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Temora to win by 2.25 lengths in 18.62, beating Jacobite Wizard. Last start finished 6th over 457m at Temora beaten 10 lengths (26.25) behind Blazing Turbo in a Grade 5 on April 1. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than he has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to figure in this.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Gosford over 515m in 29.72. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at Gosford at Grade 4/5 five days ago. Racing well and can find winning form again.

Came together on a number of occasions in the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 1.75 lengths in a NG last start at Wagga, clocking a solid 30.33 over the 525m trip. In form and must include in calculations at odds.
